message:
fix(connector): length-prefixed replay capsule encoding to prevent delimiter collisions

Replace pipe-delimited `|key=value` encoding in replay_capsule() and
build_reference_capsule() with length-prefixed `|len(key):key=len(val):val`
format. The previous encoding was ambiguous when keys or values contained
pipe or equals characters, which could cause replay verification failures
on legitimate capsules or — worse — allow crafted inputs to produce
hash collisions across distinct input sets.

The new encoding is unambiguous: each field is prefixed with its byte
length, making the delimiter characters inside values irrelevant to
parsing boundaries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
